name: Brain MRI Orbital Protocol
description: Brain MRI dedicated orbital protocol for evaluation of orbits and optic apparatus

findings.technique: MRI orbits with fat-suppressed T1, T2, and post-contrast sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Optic Nerves
sections.content: Right optic nerve: [normal / no enhancement / no tortuosity]. Left optic nerve: [normal / no enhancement / no tortuosity].

sections.name: Globes
sections.content: Right globe: [normal / no mass / no retinal detachment]. Left globe: [normal / no mass / no retinal detachment].

sections.name: Extraocular Muscles
sections.content: Extraocular muscles are [normal in size / not enlarged / symmetric].

sections.name: Orbital Fat
sections.content: Orbital fat is [clear / no infiltration / no abnormal enhancement].

impression:
1. Normal orbital MRI.
2. No orbital mass or pathology identified.
